goals: Stabilize a specific failing CI path with the smallest reproducible change.
Keep permissions and branch-protection assumptions unchanged unless explicitly approved.
Document the exact failure and why the change resolves it.
must_run: Reproduce the failing CI command locally or via a narrow equivalent.
Run: docker compose -f ops/openhands/docker-compose.yml config if the OpenHands wrapper changes.
Run the closest workflow-local verification command after the fix.
must_not_touch: branch protection settings outside the repo
workflow permission escalation without explicit approval
stop_conditions: The fix requires new secrets or credential rotation.
The fix needs broader workflow permission changes.
The task expands beyond the failing CI slice.
review_notes: Human review is mandatory for workflow edits in this repo.
Keep the fix tied to a concrete failing job or flaky path.
